items.title: X repost from @oscarsspiastree: 🚨 Oscar Piastri on if he feels he's the passenger of an AI program when it comes to the PUs "So…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @oscarsspiastree：Oscar Piastri(Oscar Piastri)说,如果他觉得自己是一个AI程序的乘客,当涉及到PU"有时,是的". . . . . . . . 驾驶一辆在直道末端前有效失去一半功率的跑车的原则,有时很难得到你的头". "即使在斯帕,许多中产地 我们只是在燃烧机上做, 完全没有电池援助, 这本身就是一种奇怪的感觉, 有一些角落有一定功率, 另一些角落有全能。 我认为Spa特别令人沮丧, 不仅对我来说,而且对很多其他人来说, 因为代码和引擎的细微差异 在轮圈时间上有很大的不同。 特别是球场前方, 我认为仍然只有九百分之一,
items.summary: 🚨 Oscar Piastri on if he feels he's the passenger of an AI program when it comes to the PUs "Sometimes, yes. ...The principle of driving a race car that loses effectively half of its power before the end of the straight is hard to get your head around sometimes." "Even in Spa, a lot of the middle sector we were doing it just on the combustion engine, with no battery assistance at all, which is a weird feeling in itself, having some corners with a certain amount of power & others with full power. I think Spa was particularly frustrating, not just for me but for quite a lot of others, because those small differences in the code & what the engines did made quite a big difference in lap time. Especially at the front of the field, I think there were still only 9 hundredths or something separating 4 positions & there were definitely more than 9 hundredths on the table for quite a few drivers with nothing they could control."
items.summary_zh: Oscar Piastri(Oscar Piastri)说,如果他觉得自己是一个AI程序的乘客,当涉及到PU"有时,是的". . . . . . . . 驾驶一辆在直道末端前有效失去一半功率的跑车的原则,有时很难得到你的头". "即使在斯帕,许多中产地 我们只是在燃烧机上做, 完全没有电池援助, 这本身就是一种奇怪的感觉, 有一些角落有一定功率, 另一些角落有全能。 我认为Spa特别令人沮丧, 不仅对我来说,而且对很多其他人来说, 因为代码和引擎的细微差异 在轮圈时间上有很大的不同。 特别是球场前方, 我认为仍然只有九百分之一,

items.summary: "i think leo is ready for f1. it's good to see how involved he is, always wanting to know more, which is an important for being a good driver. he's shown what he can do in the junior categories. hopefully he does a good job of setting up my car tomorrow!" https://t.co/CHoCOjX5iR

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "with the previous engines the penalty of things being slightly wrong was significantly less. t…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat："由于之前的引擎,对事物稍有错误的惩罚明显地少了. 今年基本上只有一半的能量 所以任何不正确的都会产生巨大的影响 我们无法控制部署 它可能会让人沮丧。"
items.summary: "with the previous engines the penalty of things being slightly wrong was significantly less. this year it's basically half the power, so anything that doesnt quite go right has massive impact. we have no control of deployment. it can be frustrating." https://t.co/W8B2uxh7bt
items.summary_zh: "由于之前的引擎,对事物稍有错误的惩罚明显地少了. 今年基本上只有一半的能量 所以任何不正确的都会产生巨大的影响 我们无法控制部署 它可能会让人沮丧。"

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: how did the upgrades feel on the simulator?" oscar: "i actually can't remember if i used the…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问:升级版在模拟版上感觉如何?" Oscar:"实际上我不记得我是否在模拟版上用过,所以我不知道! 应该更快, 这就是我关心的。 手指穿过它,只是让我们更快。"
items.summary: Q: how did the upgrades feel on the simulator?" oscar: "i actually can't remember if i used them on the simulator, so 🤷🏻‍♂️ i don't know! should be faster, that's all i care about. fingers crossed it just makes us quicker 😁" 😭😭😭 https://t.co/cmzgLjoh12
items.summary_zh: 问:升级版在模拟版上感觉如何?" Oscar:"实际上我不记得我是否在模拟版上用过,所以我不知道! 应该更快, 这就是我关心的。 手指穿过它,只是让我们更快。"

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: how would you rate your year so far?" oscar: "there's been highs and lows. probably more low…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问:目前为止,你如何评价你的年份?"Oscar:"有高有低. 可能比高低,不幸的是。 (.)我想能够改进 和更加一致地在我的游戏。 希望我们能做到这一点 这个周末。"
items.summary: Q: how would you rate your year so far?" oscar: "there's been highs and lows. probably more lows than highs, unfortunately. (...) i wanna be able to improve and be a bit more consistently on top of my game. hopefully we can do that this weekend." https://t.co/QJV0yjboyf
items.summary_zh: 问:目前为止,你如何评价你的年份?"Oscar:"有高有低. 可能比高低,不幸的是。 (.)我想能够改进 和更加一致地在我的游戏。 希望我们能做到这一点 这个周末。"

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar about leo fornaroli 🫶🏻 "tomorrow i'll give the car to fornaroli for fp1. i think he's rea…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat："明天我会把车给Fornaroli买Fp1" 我想他已经准备好F1了 他和我们做了很多测试 很高兴看到他参与的程度 他问问题并试图理解, 他是一个伟大的队友。 我认为他能做得很好。"
items.summary: oscar about leo fornaroli 🫶🏻 "tomorrow i'll give the car to fornaroli for fp1. i think he's ready for f1. he's done a lot of tests with us and it's nice to see how involved he is. he asks questions and tries to understand, he's a great teammate. i think he can do well."
items.summary_zh: "明天我会把车给Fornaroli买Fp1" 我想他已经准备好F1了 他和我们做了很多测试 很高兴看到他参与的程度 他问问题并试图理解, 他是一个伟大的队友。 我认为他能做得很好。"

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar on the struggles with the engine power deployment: "with a short straight, i don't expect…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar在与发动机动力部署的争斗中:"用短直线,我并不期望这里在发芽地出现任何重大问题,但当一辆F1车在直线上失去一半的动力时,它就可能像温泉一样让我沮丧".
items.summary: oscar on the struggles with the engine power deployment: "with a short straight, i don't expect any major problems here in budapest, but when an f1 car loses half its power on the straight… well, it risks being as frustrating as spa for me." https://t.co/0rLhg0NtKR
items.summary_zh: Oscar在与发动机动力部署的争斗中:"用短直线,我并不期望这里在发芽地出现任何重大问题,但当一辆F1车在直线上失去一半的动力时,它就可能像温泉一样让我沮丧".
